channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Experts call for tighter controls on injectable peptide trend
item.description: University of Queensland researchers urge stricter regulation of peptide supplies as illegal use surges among young Australians.

item.title: Giuliana Rancic opens up about career, breast cancer, and fitness
item.description: In a WebMD Real Stories guide, the 51-year-old reflects on her red carpet career, breast cancer experience, and staying active.

item.title: Top vitamins and nutrients recommended for women
Key early signs of breast cancer to watch for
